title: Cover Slide
description: Opening slide with presentation title, subtitle, date, and presenter info

sections.title: Presentation title — concise, conclusion-oriented. Headlines should answer 'so what?' rather than describe the topic.
sections.subtitle: Context line: audience, date, or scope (e.g., 'Q1 2026 Performance Review')
sections.presenter: Presenter name and role. Optional — omit if not relevant.

qualityRules: Title must pass the 'So what?' test — state the conclusion, not just the topic
Subtitle provides context that the title doesn't — don't repeat the title
Use Roboto font, DS Kit tokens (--zen-*) for all colors
Cover is always slide 1 — never place body slides before the cover
